__warnings.note: 'Rwendo' is the brand name (Shona word for 'journey'). Stays as-is across all packs.
Mirrored as 'Salibonani' (the Ndebele plural greeting) — the en version's 'Every journey begins with hello' is being adapted to the Ndebele equivalent. Reviewer: confirm tonal fit.
These continue an English sentence fragment after a hyperlink. Translation reads as continuation. Reviewer should test the rendered sentence flows naturally with the link in the middle.
Legal age-of-consent text. Translation tries to preserve the parental-consent caveat. Reviewer: must be precise.
AI disclosure consent. Translation aims for clarity that Rwen is not human. Reviewer: must be unambiguous in Ndebele.
'isiNdebele' is the endonym — the language calls itself isiNdebele.
Modern gender terms — Ndebele has limited established translations. Reviewer should pick wording that's respectful AND understood.
Marketing copy. Literal translations — reviewer free to rewrite for natural flow.
Self-assessment phrases. Literal translations are stiff; reviewer should rewrite naturally.
First-person quotes ('I'm scared to speak'). Translation uses Ndebele equivalents. Reviewer: confirm tone.
Place names — kept as-is (already in their endonyms). Bulawayo is the heart of Matabeleland.
Long-form policy text about minors. Literal translation. Reviewer should ensure compliance language is clear in Ndebele.
Multiline placeholder with example phrases. Examples translated to Matabeleland context, format preserved.
Three path-specific completion lines. Tonally celebratory. Reviewer free to rewrite for natural flow.
'Change anytime in Profile' references the Profile tab — translation matches whatever common.nav.profile is.

welcome.title: Rwendo
welcome.subtitle: Lonke uhambo luqala nge'Salibonani'
welcome.tagline: Funda loba yiluphi ulimi loRwen, umngane wakho we-AI

sign_in.title: Sikwemukela futhi
sign_in.subtitle: Ngena ukuze uqhubeke ngohambo lwakho
sign_in.missing_body: Ngicela ubhale i-email yakho le-password yakho.

sign_up.title: Vula i-account
sign_up.subtitle: Joyina iRwendo uqalise uhambo lwakho
sign_up.consent_terms_post: , okugoqela i-clause ye-arbitration le-class action waiver kwi-Section 15
sign_up.consent_privacy_post: , okugoqela ukuthi idatha yami ilungiswa nge-Anthropic (Claude AI) le-ElevenLabs (ilizwi)
sign_up.consent_age: Ngiyaqinisekisa ukuthi ngileminyaka eli-13 kumbe ngedlula (kumbe umzali/umlindi uvuma le mithetho ngenxa yomntwana wami oleminyaka 13-17)
sign_up.consent_ai: Ngiyaqedisisa ukuthi uRwen yiAI (artificial intelligence), ayisiye umuntu, lokuthi izimpendulo ze-AI zingaba lamaphutha njalo kazisi zincomo zochwepheshe
sign_up.consent_hint: Ngicela uvume zonke izinto eziphezulu ukuze uqhubeke
sign_up.check_email_body: Sithumele ilink yokuqinisekisa ku-{{email}}. Cindezela ukuze uvule i-account yakho, ubusungena.

learn.title: Funda Ulimi
learn.desc: Izifundo ezihlelwa kuhle, i-XP, umkhondo — fika kufluency yeA2 ukhokhelwa nguRwen.

companion.title: Akha Umngane we-AI
companion.desc: URwen abe ngumngane wakho — likhulume, nihleke, likhule ndawonye.

travel.title: I-Travel Mode
travel.desc: Incwadi yamabinzana, umkhokheli wamasiko, lendlela zaseZimbabwe.

basics.label: Ngiwazi amagama amalutshwana
basics.desc: Salibonani, sala kuhle, mhlawumbe ezinye ezimbalwa

intermediate.label: Phakathi nendawo
intermediate.desc: Ngiyakwazi ukubamba ingxoxo kodwa ngenza amaphutha

friend.label: Umngane
friend.desc: Umuntu wokuxoxisana laye lokwabelana ngosuku lwami

support.label: Usekelo lwenhliziyo
support.desc: Umuntu olalela ngenhliziyo yonke ezinsukwini ezinzima

step_age.title: Wazalwa nini?
step_age.sub: Kufanele ube leminyaka eyi-{{minAge}} kumbe ngedlula ukuze usebenzise iRwendo

step_learn_connection.title: Ukhona umuntu ofuna ukukhuluma laye nge-{{lang}}?
step_learn_connection.sub: Akudingakali — kwenza usekelo lukaRwen lube ngcono

date.note: Abasebenzisi abangakafiki kumnyaka eyi-13 abakwazi ukusebenzisa iRwendo. Abasebenzisi 13–17 balezinto ezilemingcele.

blocked.title: Kufanele ube ngu-18+
blocked.body: IRwendo khathesi idinga ukuthi abasebenzisi babe leminyaka eyi-18 kumbe ngedlula ukuze bafinyelele kuzo zonke izinto — okugoqela umngane we-AI.
blocked.family_plan_body:
Sakhela i-Family Plan ezavumela abasebenzisi abaleminyaka eyi-13–17 (kumbe 16+ e-Australia) ukusebenzisa iRwendo nxa umzali avuma.

Kuzasebenza njani:
• Umzali u-downloader iRwendo
• Umzali aqede i-identity verification
• Umzali engeza i-email yakho njalo akhe ikhodi
• Wena ufaka ikhodi ukuze ungene ku-account yakho
• Umzali angakwazi ukubuyekeza okwenziwayo nokukhethileyo

onboarding.connection_placeholder:
isibonelo "UGogo wami waseBulawayo"
"Umndeni wothandwa wami"

Tshiya kungagcwaliswa ukuze uyeqe.

complete.title: Uphumelele konke!
complete.text_companion: URwen usephelele ukukubona. Uhambo lwenu ndawonye luqala khathesi.
complete.text_learn: Uhambo lwakho lwesiNdebele luqala. URwen uzakuba lawe igxathu nganye.
complete.text_travel: Uhambo lwakho lwaseZimbabwe luqala lapha. URwen usephelele.

step_learn_target.title: Ufuna ukufunda lini?
step_learn_target.empty: Asilaso isifundo phakathi kohlangothi lwakho lokukhuluma. Buyela ku-Iphrofayili lapho esithumela esinye. Okwakhathesi, ngena usebenzise umngane we-AI.
